title: Remaining Object Family Compact Cycle Plan

planning_decision.first_family_name: Charts, graphs and BI-style data visualizations

remaining_object_families.family_name: Charts, graphs and BI-style data visualizations

compact_steps.title: Candidate + Source/Data Finalisation
compact_steps.purpose: Select the object candidate, placement section, source/data basis, inclusion-gate result, caption/credit approach and mobile-placement logic.

compact_steps.title: Controlled Object Creation
compact_steps.purpose: Create one controlled object only, with source, rights, credit, hash and reuse record.

compact_steps.title: Controlled Article Insertion Apply
compact_steps.purpose: Insert only the approved object into the selected article after backup, with marker, caption, alt/accessibility text and credit.

compact_steps.title: Post-Insertion Audit
compact_steps.purpose: Audit marker count, object hash/content, caption, credit, article shape, mobile safety, rollback readiness and forbidden mutations.

compact_steps.title: Closure + Reuse Handoff
compact_steps.purpose: Close the object-family cycle and record reusable template, source logic, design pattern and future reuse conditions.

remaining_object_families.reason: Charts/graphs improve trust where articles use quantitative claims, but require source/data validation first.
remaining_object_families.first_cycle_candidate_rule: Use only a simple chart backed by article-valid or separately recorded data. Avoid decorative charts.

compact_steps.title: Candidate + Source/Data Finalisation
compact_steps.purpose: Select the object candidate, placement section, source/data basis, inclusion-gate result, caption/credit approach and mobile-placement logic.

compact_steps.title: Controlled Object Creation
compact_steps.purpose: Create one controlled object only, with source, rights, credit, hash and reuse record.

compact_steps.title: Post-Insertion Audit
compact_steps.purpose: Audit marker count, object hash/content, caption, credit, article shape, mobile safety, rollback readiness and forbidden mutations.

compact_steps.title: Closure + Reuse Handoff
compact_steps.purpose: Close the object-family cycle and record reusable template, source logic, design pattern and future reuse conditions.

remaining_object_families.reason: Infographics improve visitor comprehension where a concept has multiple steps or dimensions.
remaining_object_families.first_cycle_candidate_rule: Use one compact, text-light infographic with mobile-safe structure.

remaining_object_families.reason: Figures/diagrams explain systems, workflows and relationships without requiring numeric datasets.
remaining_object_families.first_cycle_candidate_rule: Prefer one process or relationship diagram with clear nodes and accessibility labels.

compact_steps.title: Closure + Reuse Handoff

remaining_object_families.reason: Tables add precision when comparison or structured summary is more useful than prose.
remaining_object_families.first_cycle_candidate_rule: Use one compact table with mobile overflow control and no invented data.

remaining_object_families.reason: Maps are useful only when geographic context is materially relevant and source/licence clarity exists.
remaining_object_families.first_cycle_candidate_rule: Use a non-misleading schematic or source-backed map only after location/source validation.

remaining_object_families.reason: Composite objects combine small structured blocks, icons, quote cards or summary cards where they improve readability.
remaining_object_families.first_cycle_candidate_rule: Use only if it improves article shape without crowding the reading column.

standing_inclusion_gate: Will this improve what a visitor sees?
Will this make articles more trustworthy?
